arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim sends clear message over Man United star who Chelsea tried to sign
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim has made it clear that he wants to keep Alejandro Garnacho following recent interest from Chelsea. The Argentina international has established himself as an exciting prospect at Old Trafford since breaking into the Man Utd first-team, but he’s perhaps suffered a bit of a dip in form this season. arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca makes huge Cole Palmer decision for UEFA Conference League campaign
arts.sum: Cole Palmer has been included in Chelsea's UEFA Conference League squad for the knockout stages and potentially beyond, football.london understands. "We played some games without Cole, but Cole is something extra that you need," Maresca said back in October on his decision to leave Palmer out of the Conference League squad for the league phase games.

arts.ttl: AC Milan make immediate Joao Felix permanent Chelsea transfer statement after dream debut
arts.sum: Felix, who joined Milan on a loan deal from Chelsea earlier this week, made his debut as a second-half substitute in the Coppa Italia against Roma on Wednesday. AC Milan director Geoffrey Moncada has not ruled out the chance of Joao Felix staying at the club beyond the end of the season, after enjoying a dream start to life in Italy.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca jokes he may have to play HIMSELF up front amid Chelsea's growing injury problems - with Nicolas Jackson and Marc Guiu both out
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca joked he might have to play up front himself after injuries to Nicolas Jackson and Marc Guiu left Chelsea facing a striker shortage ahead of tomorrow's FA Cup trip to Brighton.
